hero.headline: Where every gathering becomes an
hero.subtext: Houston's premier destination for elevated private events and curated social nights.

card1.title: Date Nights &
card1.desc: Curated vibes, premium drinks, and an atmosphere designed for connection.

card2.title: Private Events &
card2.desc: Intimate celebrations to full-scale buyouts. You show up, we handle the rest.

pillars.title: The KKD
pillars.subtitle: Elevating Houston's event scene with unmatched attention to detail, design, and taste. We handle every element so you don't have to.

items.title: Custom Events
items.desc: Turnkey bespoke celebrations down to the napery.

items.title: Elevated Catering
items.desc: Chef-driven menus designed to impress and indulge.

items.title: Immersive Programming
items.desc: From mixology to live entertainment, layered experiences.

items.title: Curated Ambiance
items.desc: Aesthetic spaces styled for luxury and photogenic moments.

testimonial.quote: We booked KKD for a private 30th birthday and it was flawless. They truly thought of everything — the aesthetics, the food, the vibe.
testimonial.emphasis: Houston needed a place like this.
testimonial.author: Jasmine T.
